sqlMap.select: /*BcjisComm.selectLeftMenuList*/ SELECT * FROM (SELECT A.MENU_CD AS MENU_CD , A.UP_MENU_CD AS PARENT , A.MENU_NM AS MENU_NM , A.URL AS URL , A.LINE_UP_NO AS LINE_UP_NO , CASE WHEN A.LOWEST_MENU_YN = 'Y' THEN 'true' ELSE 'false' END AS IS_LEAF , CASE WHEN A.MENU_LEVEL >= 2 THEN 'false' ELSE 'true' END AS EXPANDED , 'true' AS LOADED , A.MENU_LEVEL - 1 AS "LEVEL" FROM TB_MENU A , (SELECT BB.MENU_CD FROM (SELECT A.MENU_CD , NVL(CASE WHEN C.POW_GR_CD IN ('BC001', 'BC002') THEN 'Y' WHEN A.UP_MENU_CD NOT IN ('MUBR00000') THEN 'Y' WHEN A.MENU_CD IN ('MUBR40000', 'MUBR50000', 'MUBR55000', 'MUBR60000', 'MUBR90000') THEN 'N' WHEN (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_USERDEPT Z WHERE Z.USER_ID = C.USER_ID AND Z.USE_YN = 'Y' ) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END, 'N') AS DEPT_YN , NVL(CASE WHEN C.POW_GR_CD IN ('BC001', 'BC002') THEN 'Y' WHEN A.UP_MENU_CD NOT IN ('MUBR00000') THEN 'Y' WHEN (SELECT COUNT(1) FROM TB_USERREPORT Z WHERE Z.USER_ID = C.USER_ID AND Z.USE_YN = 'Y' AND Z.REPORT_CD = DECODE(A.MENU_CD, 'MUBR10000', '010' , 'MUBR1T000', '010' , 'MUBR20000', '020' , 'MUBR2T000', '020' , 'MUBR30000', '030' , 'MUBR40000', '040' , 'MUBR50000', '050' , 'MUBR55000', '055' , 'MUBR60000', '060' , 'MUBR70000', '090' , 'MUBR80000', '090' , 'MUBR90000', '090' , 'MUBRA0000', '090' , 'MUBRB0000', '090' , 'MUBRC0000', '090' , 'MUBRD0000', '090' , Z.REPORT_CD) ) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END, 'N') AS REPORT_YN FROM TB_MENU A , TB_POWGRPMENU B , TB_USERPOWGRP C WHERE 1 = 1 AND C.POW_GR_CD = B.POW_GR_CD AND C.USER_ID = #userId# AND C.USE_YN = 'Y' AND B.MENU_CD = A.MENU_CD AND B.USE_YN = 'Y' AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ) BB WHERE 1 = 1 AND (BB.REPORT_YN = 'Y' OR BB.DEPT_YN = 'Y') ) B WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.MENU_CD = B.MENU_CD START WITH A.UP_MENU_CD = '000000000' CONNECT BY PRIOR A.MENU_CD = A.UP_MENU_CD ORDER SIBLINGS BY A.LINE_UP_NO ) T WHERE 1 = 1 AND T.MENU_CD NOT IN ('MU0000000')
sqlMap.insert: /*BcjisComm.insertTracelog*/ INSERT TB_TRACELOG( LOG_ID , URL , USER_ID , SESSION_ID , REQ_PARAM , REGI_YEAR , REGI_MONTH , REGI_DAY , REGI_WEEK , REGI_DATE) VALUES (#logId# , #url# , #userId# , #sessionId# , #reqParam# , TO_CHAR(SYSTIMESTAMP, 'YYYY') , TO_CHAR(SYSTIMESTAMP, 'MM') , TO_CHAR(SYSTIMESTAMP, 'DD') , TO_CHAR(SYSTIMESTAMP, 'D') , SYSTIMESTAMP )
sqlMap.select:
/*BcjisComm.selectCommComboList*/ SELECT B.GROUP_ID AS GROUP_ID , B.DETL_CD AS CODE , B.DETL_CD_NM AS CODE_NM FROM TB_COMMCD A , TB_COMMCDDETL B WHERE 1 = 1 AND B.CL_CD = A.CL_CD AND B.USE_YN = 'Y'
AND B.DETL_CD = #code#
AND B.DETL_CD <> #notCode#
AND A.CL_CD = #codeId# AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY DECODE(B.LINE_UP_ORD, NULL, 0, B.LINE_UP_ORD), B.DETL_CD
/*BcjisComm.selectCommComboListFisYear*/ SELECT 'FIS_YEAR' AS GROUP_ID , A.FIS_YEAR AS CODE , A.FIS_YEAR AS CODE_NM FROM TB_FISYEAR A WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY FIS_YEAR DESC

/*BcjisComm.selectCommComboListBgtDgr*/ SELECT A.FIS_YEAR AS GROUP_ID , A.BGT_DGR AS CODE , CASE WHEN A.BGT_COMPO_FG = '10' THEN '본예산' ELSE '추경' || ADD_TIMES || '차' END AS CODE_NM FROM TB_BGTDGR A WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY A.FIS_YEAR DESC , A.BGT_DGR DESC

/*BcjisComm.selectCommComboListFisFgMstCd*/ SELECT A.FIS_YEAR AS GROUP_ID , A.FIS_FG_MST_CD AS CODE , MAX(A.FIS_FG_MST_NM) AS CODE_NM FROM TB_YEARFISFG A WHERE 1 = 1 GROUP BY A.FIS_YEAR , A.FIS_FG_MST_CD ORDER BY A.FIS_YEAR DESC , A.FIS_FG_MST_CD ASC

/*BcjisComm.selectCommComboListFisFgCd*/ SELECT A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || A.FIS_FG_MST_CD AS GROUP_ID , A.FIS_FG_CD AS CODE , A.FIS_FG_NM AS CODE_NM FROM TB_YEARFISFG A WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY A.FIS_YEAR DESC , A.FIS_FG_CD ASC

/*BcjisComm.selectCommComboListTeMngMokCd*/ SELECT A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || A.BGT_DGR AS GROUP_ID , A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD AS CODE , SUBSTR(A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, 1, 3) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD, 4) || ' ' || A.TE_MNG_MOK_NM AS CODE_NM FROM TB_DGRTEMNGMOK A WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY A.FIS_YEAR DESC , A.BGT_DGR DESC , A.TE_MNG_MOK_CD ASC

/*BcjisComm.selectCommComboListFrscFgCd*/ SELECT A.FIS_YEAR AS GROUP_ID , A.FRSC_FG_CD AS CODE , A.FRSC_FG_CD || ' ' || A.FRSC_FG_NM AS CODE_NM FROM TB_YEARFRSC A WHERE 1 = 1 ORDER BY A.FIS_YEAR DESC , A.FRSC_FG_CD ASC
/*BcjisComm.selectCommComboListPowGrCd*/ SELECT A.POW_GR_CD AS CODE , A.POW_GR_NM AS CODE_NM FROM TB_POWGR A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.USE_YN = 'Y' ORDER BY A.POW_GR_CD

/*BcjisComm.selectCommComboListOrderYmdSeq*/ SELECT A.FIS_YEAR || '_' || A.BGT_DGR AS GROUP_ID , A.ORDER_YMD_SEQ AS CODE , MAX(SUBSTR(A.ORDER_YMD, 1, 4) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.ORDER_YMD, 5, 2) || '-' || SUBSTR(A.ORDER_YMD, 7, 2)) AS CODE_NM FROM TB_REPORT070_O A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' GROUP BY A.FIS_YEAR , A.BGT_DGR , A.ORDER_YMD_SEQ ORDER BY A.FIS_YEAR DESC , A.BGT_DGR DESC , A.ORDER_YMD_SEQ DESC
/*BcjisComm.selectCommComboListGugunFg*/ SELECT A.LOCAL_GOV_CD AS CODE , A.LOC_GOV_NM AS CODE_NM FROM TB_LOCALGOV A WHERE 1 = 1 AND UP_LOCAL_GOV_CD = '6260000' ORDER BY A.LINE_UP_NO
/*BcjisComm.selectCommComboListPledgeInfoId*/ SELECT A.PLEDGE_INFO_ID AS CODE , A.PLEDGE_INFO_NM AS CODE_NM FROM TB_PLEDGEINFO A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY A.PLEDGE_INFO_ID DESC

/*BcjisComm.selectCommComboListPledgeBizId*/ SELECT DECODE(A.PLEDGE_BIZ_LEVEL, 1, A.PLEDGE_INFO_ID, A.UP_PLEDGE_BIZ_ID) AS GROUP_ID , A.PLEDGE_BIZ_ID AS CODE , A.PLEDGE_BIZ_FG || '. ' || A.PLEDGE_BIZ_NM AS CODE_NM FROM TB_PLEDGEBIZ A WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.DEL_YN = 'N' ORDER BY A.PLEDGE_BIZ_SEQ

/*BcjisComm.selectIsCloseYn*/ SELECT NVL((SELECT CASE WHEN COUNT(1) > 0 THEN 'Y' ELSE 'N' END FROM TB_BGTDGRCLOSE Z WHERE Z.FIS_YEAR = #fisYear# AND Z.BGT_DGR = #bgtDgr# AND Z.CLOSE_YN = 'Y' ) , 'N') AS CLOSE_YN
